title: Irish Salmon Casserole
description: A moist salmon casserole with a crispy, glazed topping, perfect for indulgent comfort food.
instructions: In a pan, sauté the onion and mushrooms until softened.
In a separate bowl, mix the eggs, heavy cream, salt, and black pepper.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange the salmon fillets.
Pour the egg mixture over the salmon.
Sprinkle the chopped onion and mushrooms on top.
Mix the cheddar cheese with the glazed breadcrumbs and sprinkle on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is golden brown and the salmon is cooked through.
Let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
Serve with boiled potatoes or steamed vegetables for a complete meal.
